subcodes.first_line: O thou whose soul is seared by the fire of separation! In this grievous estrangement, heave thou a world-consuming sigh and raise a universe-burning cry [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جانسوخته آتش فراق در این فرقت پرحرقت آهی جهانسوز بکش و فغانی عالمسوز برآر
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @presence of; reunion with God, @pain of love; love as veil
